title: Robin Is Carried Away
description: Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Kokoro, CP9 agent, Wanze. Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It can't carry any passengers on it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Straw hat... so, you were safe....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just like the pirate girl said.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I see you're still alive, iceburg.

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: We just can't leave idiots be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Let's go, guys, get on!!

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: If only I had some meat......

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Why can't you eat it here?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Why would I eat that much?!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: It's alright. I'm the more veteran pilot.

summary: Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.
